==== /.src/nestedPipe.ts (6 flows) ====

=== Effect Flow ===
Kind: pipeline
Location: 5:23 - 8:2
Root: pipe(\n  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)),\n  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))\n)
Path (5 nodes):
  [0] root {effect A=number E=never R=never} pipeline
      ==> [subject] -> [1]
  [1] pipeSubject {plain A=1} 1
      ~> [call] -> [2]

      ==> [pipeable] -> [3]

      ==> [pipe] -> [4]
  [4] pipeTransformation {effect A=number E=never R=never} step 2: Effect.flatMap
